title: EndpointType::as_uri() vs BodyType::as_str() — divergent method names for same concept
description: EndpointType exposes as_uri() (line 161) while BodyType exposes as_str() (line 553) for the same operation: return the canonical wire-format string. Both are used identically inside their respective Serialize impls. The divergent names imply a semantic distinction that does not exist (both return opaque string-typed wire values). Suggested rewrite: rename EndpointType::as_uri() to as_str() to match BodyType and make the pattern uniform. The Display impl that could follow (mirroring BodyType lines 581-585) would also be enabled by this rename.
close_reason: Valid polish; deferred. Tracked in follow-up bead jmap-chat-tui-yw6v or standalone.
